title: Fix embed.js build failure — localEmbed import does not exist in agentic-embed
description: FIXED: embed.js now uses localEmbed([text]) with array argument and destructures result. All 4 tests in test/m98-embed-build-fix.test.js pass. Code verified on disk (commit 9a0c73b8). Was marked blocked because 2 unrelated stale tests (m76-embed-wiring, m77-sense-imports) fail — those are tracked in task-1775847565164. The embed fix itself is correct.
